scripts.validate: node validate-data-sync.mjs && node validate-rules-v2.mjs --allow-v1 && node validate-rules-v2-global.mjs && node test-rules-v2-export.mjs && node test-rules-v2-dio-light.mjs
scripts.validate:v2: node validate-rules-v2.mjs && node validate-rules-v2-global.mjs && node test-rules-v2-export.mjs
scripts.validate:v2:strict: node validate-rules-v2.mjs --strict && node validate-rules-v2-global.mjs --strict && node test-rules-v2-export.mjs
